steps.title: Identify the core requirement: compare disadvantages
steps.content: The task requires comparing the disadvantages of both systems. The Wayang Windu flash steam system requires geothermal reservoir temperatures above 180°C, which limits where it can be used. The Raft River binary cycle system can work at lower temperatures but costs more to maintain. A correct answer must show that trade-off.

steps.title: Find the choice that shows the trade-off
steps.content:
• Choice A — Compared with the system used at the Wayang Windu plant, the system used at the Raft River plant has a notable disadvantage: its cost.: This names only Raft River’s disadvantage and omits Wayang Windu’s temperature limitation. ✗
  • Choice B — Unlike the Raft River plant, the Wayang Windu plant uses a flash steam system, which requires a less common resource: geothermal reservoirs with temperatures above 180℃.: This names only Wayang Windu’s disadvantage and says nothing about Raft River’s higher maintenance costs. ✗
  • Choice C — The system used at the Raft River plant overcomes the temperature limitations of the Wayang Windu plant's system but is more costly to maintain.: This compares both disadvantages: Wayang Windu’s temperature limitation and Raft River’s higher maintenance cost. ✓
  • Choice D — The system at the Wayang Windu plant requires temperatures above 180℃, while the system at the Raft River plant can operate at lower temperatures.: This contrasts operating temperature but omits Raft River’s maintenance-cost disadvantage. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
